rationale: The citing paper references Mazar et al. (2008) only in literature review context: once in a grouped list of studies on misreporting/dishonesty and once as an example of objective-criterion experimental tasks with an honesty-versus-profit conflict. The citation serves to illustrate prior approaches, not to supply a specific theory, mechanism, or method that the Bayesian dual-questioning model depends on. The paper does not develop its model, hypotheses, or empirical interpretation directly from the self-concept maintenance account in Mazar et al.
